/usr/bin/ar qc libradmusic.a CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/memory/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/ods/ods_codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/ods/ods.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/ods/ods_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/ods/ods_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/ods/ods_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/pch/pch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/framework/framework.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_composition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_engine_state_fade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_engine_state_steady.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_engine_state_stitch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_engine_state_stopped.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/music/music_performance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/resource/resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/schema/schema_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/sequence/sequence_player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/sequence/sequence_region.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radmusic.dir/src/radmusic/sequence/sequence_stream_graph.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libradmusic.a
